# Model approvals

Model approvals is an Enterprise feature available only to workspace admins on Enterprise plans.

## Overview

By default, all image and video generation models are disabled for Enterprise workspaces. Workspace admins use **Model Approvals** to explicitly enable the models they want members to have access to. This gives organizations precise control over which third-party models are available within their workspace.

## Accessing model approvals

Navigate to **Workspace settings** and select the **Model Approvals** tab, or go directly to [elevenlabs.io/app/workspace/model-approvals](https://elevenlabs.io/app/workspace/model-approvals).

Only workspace admins can view and modify model approvals.

## Enabling and disabling models

The **Approved Models** page lists all available image and video generation models. Each model has a toggle that enables or disables it for your workspace.

To update model availability:

1. Toggle the switch next to each model you want to enable or disable.
2. Click **Save Changes**.

Changes take effect immediately for all workspace members.

Models that are disabled cannot be selected by any workspace member when generating images or
videos in ElevenCreative.
